sections.heading: ¡Hola! Suite Control Center
sections.body: Centralized platform for managing the full implementation and support lifecycle.

sections.heading: Tip of the Day
sections.body: Use the date filters in the top bar to analyze any period. They apply to all modules.

sections.heading: What is Kickoff?
sections.body: The first formal meeting with the customer to set expectations and the workflow.

sections.heading: Is the data real-time?
sections.body: It syncs when you click 'Sync' or log in.

sections.heading: How do I add users?
sections.body: Go to Users → New User. Only admins can create users.
